text.value: Identify the additional services you provided to the client or patient
Have you provided additional services to the client or patient?
How often is your attendance after each session?
Ask the client for his/her CTC1 clinic card, if does not have ask for his/her CTC1 number
Did the patient attend the CTC last month?
Did the patient attend the CTC last six months?
Did the patient attend the CTC last three months?
Is the client attending the CTC clinic?
Is the client a user of the CTC clinic?
Date can't be in the future
Write the last attendance date for the CTC clinic
Did not get permission from work
Reasons for not attending the CTC
Attendance at the Care and Treatment Clinic (CTC)
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Did you go to collect medication last month?
Have you provided advice on proper medication adherence?
Specify the advice provided to the client
What are the reasons for having a high viral load?
Do you understand the reasons that lead to a high viral load?
Confidentiality: Make sure confiendiality exist in your conversation with the client.
Select the visit you are working on
Ainisha huduma za ziada ulizotoa kwa mteja au mgonjwa
Je umetoa huduma za ziada kwa mteja au mgonjwa?
Je muda wa mahudhurio yako ni kila baada ya kipindi gani?
Muombe kadi ya kliniki ya CTC1, kama hana muulize namba yake ya CTC1.
mfano: 22-12-1245-234347, Angalia kwenye kadi kama anayo
Tafadhali andika namba ya CTC1 kwa mpangilio sahihi: 22-12-1245-234344
Andika namba ya CTC1 ya mteja:
Je ulihudhuria CTC miezi sita iliyopita?
Je ulihudhuria CTC miezi mitatu iliyopita?
Andika tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhudhuria kliniki ya CTC
Mahudhurio ya kliniki ya huduma na tiba CTC
Je umeenda kuchukuwa dawa mwezi ulopita?
Je umetoa ushauri kuhusu ufuasi mzuri wa dawa?
Utumiaji wa chakula chenye lishe bora
Kuwakinga wengine na ugonjwa wa ukimwi
Ni sababu zipi zinazopelekea kuwa na virusi vingi?
Unaelewa ni sababu zipi zinazopelekea mtu kuwa na wingi wa virusi?
Sababu za kuwa na virusi ving
Faragha: Hakikisha kuna usiri wakati unajadili na mteja, uwe wewe na mteja pekee.

bind.relevant: selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"one_month") and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "review" or (selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"one_month") and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "new" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_attending_ctc_clinic = "yes" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_user_of_ctc = "yes")

selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"three_months") and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "review" or (selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"three_months") and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "new" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_attending_ctc_clinic = "yes" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_user_of_ctc = "yes")

selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"six_months") and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "review" or (selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"six_months") and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "new" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_attending_ctc_clinic = "yes" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_user_of_ctc = "yes")

( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_attending_ctc_clinic = "yes" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_user_of_ctc = "yes" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "new" or /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "review") and ( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_month = "no" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"one_month") or /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_three_months = "no" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"three_months") or /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_six_months = "no" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"six_months"))

selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/reasons_not_attending_ctc ,'other_specify') and ( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_attending_ctc_clinic = "yes" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/is_client_user_of_ctc = "yes" and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "new" or /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "review") and ( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_month = "no" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"one_month") or /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_three_months = "no" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"three_months") or /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_six_months = "no" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"six_months"))

( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_month = "yes" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"one_month") or /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_three_months = "yes" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"three_months") or /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/did_patient_attend_ctc_last_six_months = "yes" and selected( /hiv_patient_follow_up/attendance_at_the_care/clinic_attendance_period ,"six_months")) and /hiv_patient_follow_up/select_a_visit/select_the_visit = "review"
